title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a context and durable-memory policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Memory Privacy applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.
